title: Julian Berger
text:
I design systems to boost human decision making in complex problems. These systems rely on collective intelligence, machine learning and anything in-between. Check out my projects here. You will learn about:

How to use collective intelligence efficiently
How to diagnose COVID-19 outcomes using interpretable machine learning
How collective intelligence could help us better understand mental disorders

I also work as a freelance data scientist and machine learning engineer mainly focused on interpretable artificial intelligence. If you want to know more, shoot me an email.
